name: completions_create
description: Generate text completions for a given prompt using language, code, or image models. Returns one or more text completions with token usage information.

parameters.name: model
parameters.description: The model ID to use for completion.

parameters.name: prompt
parameters.description: The context string for the model to complete.
parameters.example: The largest city in France is

parameters.name: max_tokens
parameters.description: Maximum number of tokens to generate.

parameters.name: top_p
parameters.description: Nucleus sampling threshold for token filtering.

parameters.name: top_k
parameters.description: Maximum tokens to consider per generation step.

parameters.name: stream
parameters.description: Stream tokens as server-sent events if true.

parameters.name: stop
parameters.description: Sequences that truncate output when generated.

parameters.name: logprobs
parameters.description: Return log probabilities for top k tokens (0-20).

parameters.name: echo
parameters.description: Include the prompt in the response.

body.prompt: The largest city in France is
